programs.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programs.desc: Eva Longoria goes to her favorite eating spots, but in Mexico City, there is always more to explore.

programs.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programs.desc: In Yucatan State, on the eastern edge of Mexico, Longoria explores the home of the ancient Maya.

programs.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programs.desc: Longoria discovers the hidden magic of Oaxaca that boasts some of the finest ingredients in Mexico.

programs.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programs.desc: Eva Longoria visits the northeastern state of Nuevo León, bordering her home state of Texas. As little grows there, and with meat on every menu, inventive and resourceful chefs transform simple ingredients into culinary delights.

programs.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programs.desc: Eva visits the state of Jalisco, where much of what is seen is quintessentially Mexican originated.

programs.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programs.desc: Eva Longoria explores Veracruz, the port gateway between Mexico and the rest of the world.
